name: Shirsh
street_level_visibility: Half-Elves remain primary, while Elves, Humans, and Gnomes support its magical-investigative and administrative posture.
visitor_signal: Visitors to Shirsh should perceive the dominant populations first and the secondary populations as stable but not polity-defining unless narrower locality canon states otherwise.
runtime_rule: Runtime narration may elaborate visible population mix but may not contradict canonical roster or exclusions.
